episodes.title: The Soviet Cult That Said God Was a Woman
episodes.description:
The Soviet Union just collapsed. No jobs. No identity. No future. Into that chaos stepped a woman in white robes who looked into a camera and said — I am God. And the world ends November 24, 1993.
Her name was Maria Devi Christos. And 80,000 people across Ukraine and Russia gave up their families, their money, and their lives to follow her.
This is the story of the Great White Brotherhood — the most dangerous cult you’ve never heard of. How a Soviet journalist became a living messiah. How teenagers vanished from their homes overnight. And how it all ended with hundreds of people storming Saint Sophia’s Cathedral in Kyiv, ready to set themselves on fire.
The world didn’t end. But what happened inside that cathedral will haunt you.
